expectations.text: States that the workflow hard-stops after Phase 7 once Gate E passes
expectations.evidence: Response names a hard stop after Phase 7 / Gate E.

expectations.text: Does not agree to continue into Phase 8 in the same session
expectations.evidence: Response does not clearly refuse same-session Phase 8 execution.

expectations.text: Tells the user to resume from a fresh session with `RESUME=2026-04-23-add-rate-limit-logs` or equivalent
expectations.evidence: Missing explicit fresh-session resume handoff with the expected slug.

expectations.text: Identifies Phase 8 as the next phase after the resume rather than restarting earlier phases
expectations.evidence: Response does not clearly identify Phase 8 as the post-resume continuation point.
